hindi: न जानामि शब्दं न जानामि चार्थं,
english: I know not the word, I know not the meaning
roman: Na janami shabdam na janami chartham

hindi: न जानामि पद्यं न जानामि गद्यम्।
english: I know not poetry, I know not prose
roman: Na janami padyam na janami gadyam

english: O Kumar, son of Shambhu whose nature is pure consciousness
Forgive my shortcomings, O Lord, protect me, O Murari
May I become one who is worthy to serve your lotus feet worshipped by Indra and all gods
roman: Suresha di sevya anghri padmo bhaveyam

english: You are the one served even by Shiva, you ride the peacock
roman: Shivasya api sevyah shikhi vahano asi

english: Established in the lotus petals of the six base chakras
Salutations to the six-faced one, O Lord, protect me, O Murare
Victory to the abode of joy, victory to the abode of love
roman: Jaya nanda bhume jaya prema dhame

english: Victory to the lotus feet meditated upon in the hearts of yogis
Victory to the swift doer, victory to the long-armed one
roman: Jaya kshipra karin jaya dirgha baho

english: Victory to the twelve-eyed one, O Lord protect me, O Murare
roman: Jaya dvadash aksha Prabho pahi Murare
